mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO congestion_log ( score, log_date, place_id, created_at, updated_at, is_active ) VALUES
( #{congestion.score}, #{congestion.logDate}, #{congestion.placeId}, #{congestion.createdAt}, #{congestion.updatedAt}, #{congestion.isActive} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = VALUES(score), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), is_active = VALUES(is_active)
